name: Buttermilk Salad Dressing (06/09/93)
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon fresh tarragon, minced (or 1 teaspoon dried)
Salt and coarse pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, gently fold together the buttermilk, light mayonnaise, parsley, chives, garlic, tarragon, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and pepper until combined.
2. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
3. Spoon over torn lettuce or mixed salad. Makes about 1 cup dressing, with approximately 25 calories per tablespoon.
